mapper.select: SELECT C.CARE_NUMBER AS careNumber, C.CARE_TITLE AS careTitle, C.CARE_WRITE_DATE AS careDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ddd_care_apply a WHERE a.care_number = c.care_number) || '/' || c.care_recruit AS applyStatus, C.CARE_RECRUIT AS careRecruit FROM DDD_CARE C WHERE C.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} AND C.CARE_STATUS != 'deleted' ORDER BY C.CARE_NUMBER DESC
